verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus ad Moysen, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה לֵּאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hic est ritus leprosi, quando mundandus est. Adducetur ad sacerdotem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֤את תִּֽהְיֶה֙ תּוֹרַ֣ת הַמְּצֹרָ֔ע בְּי֖וֹם טׇהֳרָת֑וֹ וְהוּבָ֖א אֶל־הַכֹּהֵֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: This is the rite of a leper, when he is to be cleansed. He shall be brought to the priest:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tämä on spitalisen sääty: koska hän puhdistetaan, hän pitää tuotaman papin tykö.
verses.king_james: This shall be the law of the leper in the day of his cleansing: He shall be brought unto the priest:

verses.latin_vulgate: qui egressus de castris, cum invenerit lepram esse mundatam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָצָא֙ הַכֹּהֵ֔ן אֶל־מִח֖וּץ לַֽמַּחֲנֶ֑ה וְרָאָה֙ הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְהִנֵּ֛ה נִרְפָּ֥א נֶֽגַע־הַצָּרַ֖עַת מִן־הַצָּרֽוּעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who going out of the camp, when he shall find that the leprosy is cleansed,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papin pitää käymän ulos leiristä, katselemaan häntä, jos spitalin haava on parantunut spitalisesta.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall go forth out of the camp; and the priest shall look, and, behold, if the plague of leprosy be healed in the leper;

verses.latin_vulgate: præcipiet ei, qui purificatur, ut offerat duos passeres vivos pro se, quibus vesci licitum est, et lignum cedrinum, vermiculumque et hyssopum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְצִוָּה֙ הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְלָקַ֧ח לַמִּטַּהֵ֛ר שְׁתֵּֽי־צִפֳּרִ֥ים חַיּ֖וֹת טְהֹר֑וֹת וְעֵ֣ץ אֶ֔רֶז וּשְׁנִ֥י תוֹלַ֖עַת וְאֵזֹֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Shall command him that is to be purified, to offer for himself two living sparrows, which it is lawful to eat, and cedar wood, and scarlet, and hyssop.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pappi käskekään sen, joka puhdistetaan, ottaa kaksi elävää puhdasta lintua, ja sedripuuta, ja tulipunaiseksi painettua villaa, ja isoppia.
verses.king_james: Then shall the priest command to take for him that is to be cleansed two birds alive and clean, and cedar wood, and scarlet, and hyssop:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et unum ex passeribus immolari jubebit in vase fictili super aquas viventes :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְצִוָּה֙ הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְשָׁחַ֖ט אֶת־הַצִּפּ֣וֹר הָאֶחָ֑ת אֶל־כְּלִי־חֶ֖רֶשׂ עַל־מַ֥יִם חַיִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall command one of the sparrows to be immolated in an earthen vessel over living waters.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pappi käskekään sen teurastaa yhden linnun saviastiassa, vuotavan veden tykönä.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall command that one of the birds be killed in an earthen vessel over running water:

verses.latin_vulgate: alium autem vivum cum ligno cedrino, et cocco et hyssopo, tinget in sanguine passeris immolati,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶת־הַצִּפֹּ֤ר הַֽחַיָּה֙ יִקַּ֣ח אֹתָ֔הּ וְאֶת־עֵ֥ץ הָאֶ֛רֶז וְאֶת־שְׁנִ֥י הַתּוֹלַ֖עַת וְאֶת־הָאֵזֹ֑ב וְטָבַ֨ל אוֹתָ֜ם וְאֵ֣ת ׀ הַצִּפֹּ֣ר הַֽחַיָּ֗ה בְּדַם֙ הַצִּפֹּ֣ר הַשְּׁחֻטָ֔ה עַ֖ל הַמַּ֥יִם הַֽחַיִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the other that is alive, he shall dip, with the cedar wood, and the scarlet and the hyssop, in the blood of the sparrow that is immolated:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ottakaan elävän linnun sedripuun kanssa, tulipunalla painetun villan ja isopin, ja kastakaan tapetun linnun vereen, vuotavan veden tykönä.
verses.king_james: As for the living bird, he shall take it, and the cedar wood, and the scarlet, and the hyssop, and shall dip them and the living bird in the blood of the bird that was killed over the running water:

verses.latin_vulgate: quo asperget illum, qui mundandus est, septies, ut jure purgetur : et dimittet passerem vivum, ut in agrum avolet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִזָּ֗ה עַ֧ל הַמִּטַּהֵ֛ר מִן־הַצָּרַ֖עַת שֶׁ֣בַע פְּעָמִ֑ים וְטִ֣הֲר֔וֹ וְשִׁלַּ֛ח אֶת־הַצִּפֹּ֥ר הַֽחַיָּ֖ה עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַשָּׂדֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Wherewith he shall sprinkle him that is to be cleansed seven times, that he may be rightly purified. And he shall let go the living sparrow, that it may fly into the field.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja priiskottakaan spitalista puhdistettavan päälle seitsemän kertaa: ja niin puhdistakaan hänen, ja antakaan elävän linnun lentää kedolle.
verses.king_james: And he shall sprinkle upon him that is to be cleansed from the leprosy seven times, and shall pronounce him clean, and shall let the living bird loose into the open field.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque laverit homo vestimenta sua, radet omnes pilos corporis, et lavabitur aqua : purificatusque ingredietur castra, ita dumtaxat ut maneat extra tabernaculum suum septem diebus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכִבֶּס֩ הַמִּטַּהֵ֨ר אֶת־בְּגָדָ֜יו וְגִלַּ֣ח אֶת־כׇּל־שְׂעָר֗וֹ וְרָחַ֤ץ בַּמַּ֙יִם֙ וְטָהֵ֔ר וְאַחַ֖ר יָב֣וֹא אֶל־הַֽמַּחֲנֶ֑ה וְיָשַׁ֛ב מִח֥וּץ לְאׇהֳל֖וֹ שִׁבְעַ֥ת יָמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the man hath washed his clothes, he shall shave all the hair of his body, and shall be washed with water: and being purified he shall enter into the camp, yet so that he tarry without his own tent seven days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta puhdistettu peskään vaatteensa, ja ajelkaan kaikki hiuksensa, ja peskään itsensä vedessä ja niin on hän puhdas. Menkään sitte leiriin, kuitenkin asukaan ulkona majastansa seitsemän päivää.
verses.king_james: And he that is to be cleansed shall wash his clothes, and shave off all his hair, and wash himself in water, that he may be clean: and after that he shall come into the camp, and shall tarry abroad out of his tent seven days.

verses.latin_vulgate: et die septimo radet capillos capitis, barbamque et supercilia, ac totius corporis pilos. Et lotis rursum vestibus et corpore,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָה֩ בַיּ֨וֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִ֜י יְגַלַּ֣ח אֶת־כׇּל־שְׂעָר֗וֹ אֶת־רֹאשׁ֤וֹ וְאֶת־זְקָנוֹ֙ וְאֵת֙ גַּבֹּ֣ת עֵינָ֔יו וְאֶת־כׇּל־שְׂעָר֖וֹ יְגַלֵּ֑חַ וְכִבֶּ֣ס אֶת־בְּגָדָ֗יו וְרָחַ֧ץ אֶת־בְּשָׂר֛וֹ בַּמַּ֖יִם וְטָהֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And on the seventh day he shall shave the hair of his head, and his beard and his eyebrows, and the hair of all his body. And having washed again his clothes, and his body,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja seitsemäntenä päivänä pitää hänen ajeleman kaikki hiukset päästänsä, ja partansa ja karvat silmäkulmistansa, niin että kaikki karvat ovat ajellut, ja pitää pesemän vaatteensa, ja pesemän ihonsa vedellä, niin on hän puhdas.
verses.king_james: But it shall be on the seventh day, that he shall shave all his hair off his head and his beard and his eyebrows, even all his hair he shall shave off: and he shall wash his clothes, also he shall wash his flesh in water, and he shall be clean.

verses.latin_vulgate: die octavo assumet duos agnos immaculatos, et ovem anniculam absque macula, et tres decimas similæ in sacrificium, quæ conspersa sit oleo, et seorsum olei sextarium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבַיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁמִינִ֗י יִקַּ֤ח שְׁנֵֽי־כְבָשִׂים֙ תְּמִימִ֔ם וְכַבְשָׂ֥ה אַחַ֛ת בַּת־שְׁנָתָ֖הּ תְּמִימָ֑ה וּשְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה עֶשְׂרֹנִ֗ים סֹ֤לֶת מִנְחָה֙ בְּלוּלָ֣ה בַשֶּׁ֔מֶן וְלֹ֥ג אֶחָ֖ד שָֽׁמֶן׃
verses.douay_rheims: On the eighth day, he shall take two lambs without blemish, and an ewe of a year old without blemish, and three tenths of flour tempered with oil for a sacrifice, and a sextary of oil apart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kahdeksantena päivänä pitää hänen ottaman kaksi virheetöintä karitsaa, ja virheettömän vuosikuntaisen lampaan, niin myös kolme kymmenestä sämpyläjauhoja ruokauhriksi, öljyllä sekoitettuja, ja yhden login öljyä.
verses.king_james: And on the eighth day he shall take two he lambs without blemish, and one ewe lamb of the first year without blemish, and three tenth deals of fine flour for a meat offering, mingled with oil, and one log of oil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque sacerdos purificans hominem, statuerit eum, et hæc omnia coram Domino in ostio tabernaculi testimonii,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֶעֱמִ֞יד הַכֹּהֵ֣ן הַֽמְטַהֵ֗ר אֵ֛ת הָאִ֥ישׁ הַמִּטַּהֵ֖ר וְאֹתָ֑ם לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה פֶּ֖תַח אֹ֥הֶל מוֹעֵֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the priest that purifieth the man, hath presented him, and all these things before the Lord, at the door of the tabernacle of the testimony:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin pitää papin, joka puhdisti, asettaman puhdistetun ja tämän kalun, Herran eteen seurakunnan majan oven edessä.
verses.king_james: And the priest that maketh him clean shall present the man that is to be made clean, and those things, before the Lord, at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation:

verses.latin_vulgate: tollet agnum et offeret eum pro delicto, oleique sextarium : et oblatis ante Dominum omnibus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָקַ֨ח הַכֹּהֵ֜ן אֶת־הַכֶּ֣בֶשׂ הָאֶחָ֗ד וְהִקְרִ֥יב אֹת֛וֹ לְאָשָׁ֖ם וְאֶת־לֹ֣ג הַשָּׁ֑מֶן וְהֵנִ֥יף אֹתָ֛ם תְּנוּפָ֖ה לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall take a lamb, and offer it for a trespass offering with the sextary of oil. And having offered all before the Lord,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papin pitää ottaman yhden karitsan, ja uhraaman vikauhriksi, öljylogin kanssa, ja pitää ne häälyttämäm häälytykseksi Herran edessä.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall take one he lamb, and offer him for a trespass offering, and the log of oil, and wave them for a wave offering before the Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: immolabit agnum, ubi solet immolari hostia pro peccato, et holocaustum, id est, in loco sancto. Sicut enim pro peccato, ita et pro delicto ad sacerdotem pertinet hostia : Sancta sanctorum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁחַ֣ט אֶת־הַכֶּ֗בֶשׂ בִּ֠מְק֠וֹם אֲשֶׁ֨ר יִשְׁחַ֧ט אֶת־הַֽחַטָּ֛את וְאֶת־הָעֹלָ֖ה בִּמְק֣וֹם הַקֹּ֑דֶשׁ כִּ֡י כַּ֠חַטָּ֠את הָאָשָׁ֥ם הוּא֙ לַכֹּהֵ֔ן קֹ֥דֶשׁ קׇֽדָשִׁ֖ים הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall immolate the lamb, where the victim for sin is wont to be immolated, and the holocaust, that is, in the holy place. For as that which is for sin, so also the victim for a trespass offering pertaineth to the priest: it is holy of holies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sitte teurastaman karitsan sillä paikalla, kussa rikosuhri ja polttouhri teurastetaan, pyhässä siassa; sillä niinkuin rikosuhri, niin myös vikauhrikin on papin oma; sillä se on kaikkein pyhin.
verses.king_james: And he shall slay the lamb in the place where he shall kill the sin offering and the burnt offering, in the holy place: for as the sin offering is the priest’s, so is the trespass offering: it is most holy:

verses.latin_vulgate: Assumensque sacerdos de sanguine hostiæ, quæ immolata est pro delicto, ponet super extremum auriculæ dextræ ejus qui mundatur, et super pollices manus dextræ et pedis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָקַ֣ח הַכֹּהֵן֮ מִדַּ֣ם הָאָשָׁם֒ וְנָתַן֙ הַכֹּהֵ֔ן עַל־תְּנ֛וּךְ אֹ֥זֶן הַמִּטַּהֵ֖ר הַיְמָנִ֑ית וְעַל־בֹּ֤הֶן יָדוֹ֙ הַיְמָנִ֔ית וְעַל־בֹּ֥הֶן רַגְל֖וֹ הַיְמָנִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the priest taking of the blood of the victim that was immolated for trespass, shall put it upon the tip of the right ear of him that is cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand and the great toe of his right foot.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papin pitää ottaman vikauhrin verta ja sivuman puhdistetun oikian korvan lehteen, niin myös oikian käden peukaloon, ja oikian jalan isoon varpaaseen.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall take some of the blood of the trespass offering, and the priest shall put it upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot:

verses.latin_vulgate: et de olei sextario mittet in manum suam sinistram,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָקַ֥ח הַכֹּהֵ֖ן מִלֹּ֣ג הַשָּׁ֑מֶן וְיָצַ֛ק עַל־כַּ֥ף הַכֹּהֵ֖ן הַשְּׂמָאלִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall pour of the sextary of oil into his own left hand,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papin pitää ottaman öljylogista ja vuodattaman papin vasempaan käteen.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall take some of the log of oil, and pour it into the palm of his own left hand:

verses.latin_vulgate: tingetque digitum dextrum in eo, et asperget coram Domino septies.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְטָבַ֤ל הַכֹּהֵן֙ אֶת־אֶצְבָּע֣וֹ הַיְמָנִ֔ית מִן־הַשֶּׁ֕מֶן אֲשֶׁ֥ר עַל־כַּפּ֖וֹ הַשְּׂמָאלִ֑ית וְהִזָּ֨ה מִן־הַשֶּׁ֧מֶן בְּאֶצְבָּע֛וֹ שֶׁ֥בַע פְּעָמִ֖ים לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And shall dip his right finger in it, and sprinkle it before the Lord seven times.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papin pitää kastaman oikian kätensä sormen öljyyn, joka hänen vasemmassa kädessänsä on, ja priiskottaman öljyä sormellansa seitsemän kertaa Herran edessä.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall dip his right finger in the oil that is in his left hand, and shall sprinkle of the oil with his finger seven times before the Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod autem reliquum est olei in læva manu, fundet super extremum auriculæ dextræ ejus qui mundatur, et super pollices manus ac pedis dextri, et super sanguinem qui effusus est pro delicto,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִיֶּ֨תֶר הַשֶּׁ֜מֶן אֲשֶׁ֣ר עַל־כַּפּ֗וֹ יִתֵּ֤ן הַכֹּהֵן֙ עַל־תְּנ֞וּךְ אֹ֤זֶן הַמִּטַּהֵר֙ הַיְמָנִ֔ית וְעַל־בֹּ֤הֶן יָדוֹ֙ הַיְמָנִ֔ית וְעַל־בֹּ֥הֶן רַגְל֖וֹ הַיְמָנִ֑ית עַ֖ל דַּ֥ם הָאָשָֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the rest of the oil in his left hand, he shall pour upon the tip of the right ear of him that is cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand and the great toe of his right foot, and upon the blood that was shed for trespass:
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan käteensä jääneestä öljystä pitää papin paneman puhdistetun oikian korvan lehteen, ja oikiaan peukaloon, ja oikian jalan isoon varpaaseen, vikauhrin veren päälle.
verses.king_james: And of the rest of the oil that is in his hand shall the priest put upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot, upon the blood of the trespass offering:

verses.latin_vulgate: et super caput ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַנּוֹתָ֗ר בַּשֶּׁ֙מֶן֙ אֲשֶׁר֙ עַל־כַּ֣ף הַכֹּהֵ֔ן יִתֵּ֖ן עַל־רֹ֣אשׁ הַמִּטַּהֵ֑ר וְכִפֶּ֥ר עָלָ֛יו הַכֹּהֵ֖ן לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And upon his head.
verses.finnish_biblia: Käteensä jääneen öljyn, pitää papin paneman puhdistetun pään päälle, ja papin pitää sovittaman häntä Herran edessä.
verses.king_james: And the remnant of the oil that is in the priest’s hand he shall pour upon the head of him that is to be cleansed: and the priest shall make an atonement for him before the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rogabitque pro eo coram Domino, et faciet sacrificium pro peccato : tunc immolabit holocaustum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָשָׂ֤ה הַכֹּהֵן֙ אֶת־הַ֣חַטָּ֔את וְכִפֶּ֕ר עַל־הַמִּטַּהֵ֖ר מִטֻּמְאָת֑וֹ וְאַחַ֖ר יִשְׁחַ֥ט אֶת־הָעֹלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall pray for him before the Lord, and shall offer the sacrifice for sin. Then shall he immolate the holocaust.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papin pitää tekemän rikosuhrin, ja sovittaman puhdistetun hänen saastaisuudestansa, ja sen jälkeen teurastaman polttouhrin.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall offer the sin offering, and make an atonement for him that is to be cleansed from his uncleanness; and afterward he shall kill the burnt offering:

verses.latin_vulgate: et ponet illud in altari cum libamentis suis, et homo rite mundabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֶעֱלָ֧ה הַכֹּהֵ֛ן אֶת־הָעֹלָ֥ה וְאֶת־הַמִּנְחָ֖ה הַמִּזְבֵּ֑חָה וְכִפֶּ֥ר עָלָ֛יו הַכֹּהֵ֖ן וְטָהֵֽר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And put it on the altar with the libations thereof: and the man shall be rightly cleansed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papin pitää uhraaman polttouhrin ja ruokauhrin alttarilla, ja papin pitää sovittaman häntä, niin hän on puhdas.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall offer the burnt offering and the meat offering upon the altar: and the priest shall make an atonement for him, and he shall be clean.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod si pauper est, et non potest manus ejus invenire quæ dicta sunt pro delicto, assumet agnum ad oblationem, ut roget pro eo sacerdos, decimamque partem similæ conspersæ oleo in sacrificium, et olei sextarium,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־דַּ֣ל ה֗וּא וְאֵ֣ין יָדוֹ֮ מַשֶּׂ֒גֶת֒ וְ֠לָקַ֠ח כֶּ֣בֶשׂ אֶחָ֥ד אָשָׁ֛ם לִתְנוּפָ֖ה לְכַפֵּ֣ר עָלָ֑יו וְעִשָּׂר֨וֹן סֹ֜לֶת אֶחָ֨ד בָּל֥וּל בַּשֶּׁ֛מֶן לְמִנְחָ֖ה וְלֹ֥ג שָֽׁמֶן׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if he be poor, and his hand cannot find the things aforesaid: he shall take a lamb for an offering for trespass, that the priest may pray for him, and a tenth part of flour tempered with oil for a sacrifice, and a sextary of oil:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos hän on köyhä eikä ole hänellä varaa, niin ottakaan karitsan vikauhrinsa edestä häälytykseksi, sovittaakseen häntä, ja yhden kymmeneksen sämpyläjauhoja, sekoitetun öljyllä, ruokauhriksi, ja login öljyä,
verses.king_james: And if he be poor, and cannot get so much; then he shall take one lamb for a trespass offering to be waved, to make an atonement for him, and one tenth deal of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering, and a log of oil;

verses.latin_vulgate: duosque turtures sive duos pullos columbæ, quorum unus sit pro peccato, et alter in holocaustum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁתֵּ֣י תֹרִ֗ים א֤וֹ שְׁנֵי֙ בְּנֵ֣י יוֹנָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר תַּשִּׂ֖יג יָד֑וֹ וְהָיָ֤ה אֶחָד֙ חַטָּ֔את וְהָאֶחָ֖ד עֹלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And two turtles or two young pigeons, of which one may be for sin, and the other for a holocaust.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaksi mettistä eli kaksi kyyhkyläisen poikaa, jotka hän voi saada: toinen olkoon rikosuhriksi, ja toinen polttouhriksi.
verses.king_james: And two turtledoves, or two young pigeons, such as he is able to get; and the one shall be a sin offering, and the other a burnt offering.

verses.latin_vulgate: offeretque ea die octavo purificationis suæ sacerdoti, ad ostium tabernaculi testimonii coram Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֵבִ֨יא אֹתָ֜ם בַּיּ֧וֹם הַשְּׁמִינִ֛י לְטׇהֳרָת֖וֹ אֶל־הַכֹּהֵ֑ן אֶל־פֶּ֥תַח אֹֽהֶל־מוֹעֵ֖ד לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall offer them on the eighth day of his purification to the priest, at the door of the tabernacle of the testimony before the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kantakaan sen papille kahdeksantena päivänä puhdistukseksensa, seurakunnan majan oven eteen, Herran edessä.
verses.king_james: And he shall bring them on the eighth day for his cleansing unto the priest, unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, before the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui suscipiens agnum pro delicto et sextarium olei, levabit simul :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָקַ֧ח הַכֹּהֵ֛ן אֶת־כֶּ֥בֶשׂ הָאָשָׁ֖ם וְאֶת־לֹ֣ג הַשָּׁ֑מֶן וְהֵנִ֨יף אֹתָ֧ם הַכֹּהֵ֛ן תְּנוּפָ֖ה לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the priest receiving the lamb for trespass, and the sextary of oil, shall elevate them together.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin pitää papin ottaman vikauhrin karitsan, ja login öljyä, ja papin pitää ne häälyttämän häälytykseksi Herran edessä,
verses.king_james: And the priest shall take the lamb of the trespass offering, and the log of oil, and the priest shall wave them for a wave offering before the Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: immolatoque agno, de sanguine ejus ponet super extremum auriculæ dextræ illius qui mundatur, et super pollices manus ejus ac pedis dextri :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁחַט֮ אֶת־כֶּ֣בֶשׂ הָֽאָשָׁם֒ וְלָקַ֤ח הַכֹּהֵן֙ מִדַּ֣ם הָֽאָשָׁ֔ם וְנָתַ֛ן עַל־תְּנ֥וּךְ אֹֽזֶן־הַמִּטַּהֵ֖ר הַיְמָנִ֑ית וְעַל־בֹּ֤הֶן יָדוֹ֙ הַיְמָנִ֔ית וְעַל־בֹּ֥הֶן רַגְל֖וֹ הַיְמָנִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the lamb being immolated, he shall put of the blood thereof upon the tip of the right ear of him that is cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and the great toe of his right foot.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teurastaman vikauhrin karitsan, ja papin pitää ottaman vikauhrin verta, ja sivuman puhdistetun oikian korvan lehteen, niin myös oikian käden peukaloon, ja oikian jalan isoon varpaaseen.
verses.king_james: And he shall kill the lamb of the trespass offering, and the priest shall take some of the blood of the trespass offering, and put it upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot:

verses.latin_vulgate: olei vero partem mittet in manum suam sinistram,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִן־הַשֶּׁ֖מֶן יִצֹ֣ק הַכֹּהֵ֑ן עַל־כַּ֥ף הַכֹּהֵ֖ן הַשְּׂמָאלִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: But he shall pour part of the oil into his own left hand,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papin pitää vuodattaman öljyä papin vasempaan käteen.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall pour of the oil into the palm of his own left hand:

verses.latin_vulgate: in quo tingens digitum dextræ manus asperget septies coram Domino :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִזָּ֤ה הַכֹּהֵן֙ בְּאֶצְבָּע֣וֹ הַיְמָנִ֔ית מִן־הַשֶּׁ֕מֶן אֲשֶׁ֥ר עַל־כַּפּ֖וֹ הַשְּׂמָאלִ֑ית שֶׁ֥בַע פְּעָמִ֖ים לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And dipping the finger of his right hand in it, he shall sprinkle it seven times before the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papin pitää priiskottaman oikian käden sormella öljyä, joka on hänen vasemmassa kädessänsä, seitsemän kertaa Herran edessä.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall sprinkle with his right finger some of the oil that is in his left hand seven times before the Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: tangetque extremum dextræ auriculæ illius qui mundatur, et pollices manus ac pedis dextri, in loco sanguinis qui effusus est pro delicto :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַ֨ן הַכֹּהֵ֜ן מִן־הַשֶּׁ֣מֶן ׀ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עַל־כַּפּ֗וֹ עַל־תְּנ֞וּךְ אֹ֤זֶן הַמִּטַּהֵר֙ הַיְמָנִ֔ית וְעַל־בֹּ֤הֶן יָדוֹ֙ הַיְמָנִ֔ית וְעַל־בֹּ֥הֶן רַגְל֖וֹ הַיְמָנִ֑ית עַל־מְק֖וֹם דַּ֥ם הָאָשָֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall touch the tip of the right ear of him that is cleansed, and the thumb of his right hand and the great toe of his right foot, in the place of the blood that was shed for trespass.
verses.finnish_biblia: Käteensä jääneestä öljystä pitää papin panenman puhdistetun oikian korvan lehteen, ja oikian käden peukaloon, ja oikian jalan isoon varpaaseen, vikauhrin veren päälle.
verses.king_james: And the priest shall put of the oil that is in his hand upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot, upon the place of the blood of the trespass offering:

verses.latin_vulgate: reliquam autem partem olei, quæ est in sinistra manu, mittet super caput purificati, ut placet pro eo Dominum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַנּוֹתָ֗ר מִן־הַשֶּׁ֙מֶן֙ אֲשֶׁר֙ עַל־כַּ֣ף הַכֹּהֵ֔ן יִתֵּ֖ן עַל־רֹ֣אשׁ הַמִּטַּהֵ֑ר לְכַפֵּ֥ר עָלָ֖יו לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the other part of the oil that is in his left hand, he shall pour upon the head of the purified person, that he may appease the Lord for him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja käteensä jääneen öljyn pankaan papin puhdistetun pään päälle, ja sovittakoon häntä Herran edessä.
verses.king_james: And the rest of the oil that is in the priest’s hand he shall put upon the head of him that is to be cleansed, to make an atonement for him before the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: et turturem sive pullum columbæ offeret,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָשָׂ֤ה אֶת־הָֽאֶחָד֙ מִן־הַתֹּרִ֔ים א֖וֹ מִן־בְּנֵ֣י הַיּוֹנָ֑ה מֵאֲשֶׁ֥ר תַּשִּׂ֖יג יָדֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall offer a turtle, or young pigeon:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja valmistakaan mettisiä, taikka kyhkyläisen poikia, jotka hän on voinut saada,
verses.king_james: And he shall offer the one of the turtledoves, or of the young pigeons, such as he can get;

verses.latin_vulgate: unum pro delicto, et alterum in holocaustum cum libamentis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣ת אֲשֶׁר־תַּשִּׂ֞יג יָד֗וֹ אֶת־הָאֶחָ֥ד חַטָּ֛את וְאֶת־הָאֶחָ֥ד עֹלָ֖ה עַל־הַמִּנְחָ֑ה וְכִפֶּ֧ר הַכֹּהֵ֛ן עַ֥ל הַמִּטַּהֵ֖ר לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: One for trespass, and the other for a holocaust, with their libations.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nimittäin niitä, joita hän on voinut saada: yhden rikosuhriksi ja toisen polttouhriksi, ynnä ruokauhrin kanssa; ja niin pitää papin sovittaman puhdistetun Herran edessä,
verses.king_james: Even such as he is able to get, the one for a sin offering, and the other for a burnt offering, with the meat offering: and the priest shall make an atonement for him that is to be cleansed before the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc est sacrificium leprosi, qui habere non potest omnia in emundationem sui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֣את תּוֹרַ֔ת אֲשֶׁר־בּ֖וֹ נֶ֣גַע צָרָ֑עַת אֲשֶׁ֛ר לֹֽא־תַשִּׂ֥יג יָד֖וֹ בְּטׇהֳרָתֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: This is the sacrifice of a leper, that is not able to have all things that appertain to his cleansing.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on sääty spitalisesta, joka ei voi saada sitä, mikä hänen puhdistukseensa tarvitaan.
verses.king_james: This is the law of him in whom is the plague of leprosy, whose hand is not able to get that which pertaineth to his cleansing.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus ad Moysen et Aaron, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה וְאֶֽל־אַהֲרֹ֖ן לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle ja Aaronille, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum ingressi fueritis terram Chanaan, quam ego dabo vobis in possessionem, si fuerit plaga lepræ in ædibus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י תָבֹ֙אוּ֙ אֶל־אֶ֣רֶץ כְּנַ֔עַן אֲשֶׁ֥ר אֲנִ֛י נֹתֵ֥ן לָכֶ֖ם לַאֲחֻזָּ֑ה וְנָתַתִּי֙ נֶ֣גַע צָרַ֔עַת בְּבֵ֖ית אֶ֥רֶץ אֲחֻזַּתְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: When you shall come into the land of Chanaan, which I will give you for a possession, if there be the plague or leprosy in a house:
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska te tulette Kanaanin maalle, jonka minä annan teille omaisuudeksi, ja minä sen maan huoneesen spitalin haavan annan,
verses.king_james: When ye be come into the land of Canaan, which I give to you for a possession, and I put the plague of leprosy in a house of the land of your possession;

verses.latin_vulgate: ibit cujus est domus, nuntians sacerdoti, et dicet : Quasi plaga lepræ videtur mihi esse in domo mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָא֙ אֲשֶׁר־ל֣וֹ הַבַּ֔יִת וְהִגִּ֥יד לַכֹּהֵ֖ן לֵאמֹ֑ר כְּנֶ֕גַע נִרְאָ֥ה לִ֖י בַּבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: He whose house it is, shall go and tell the priest, saying: It seemeth to me, that there is the plague of leprosy in my house,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin pitää sen tuleman, jonka huone on, ja ilmoittaman papille, sanoen: minun huoneessani näkyy niinkuin (spitalin) haava;
verses.king_james: And he that owneth the house shall come and tell the priest, saying, It seemeth to me there is as it were a plague in the house:

verses.latin_vulgate: At ille præcipiet ut efferant universa de domo, priusquam ingrediatur eam, et videat utrum leprosa sit, ne immunda fiant omnia quæ in domo sunt. Intrabitque postea ut consideret lepram domus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְצִוָּ֨ה הַכֹּהֵ֜ן וּפִנּ֣וּ אֶת־הַבַּ֗יִת בְּטֶ֨רֶם יָבֹ֤א הַכֹּהֵן֙ לִרְא֣וֹת אֶת־הַנֶּ֔גַע וְלֹ֥א יִטְמָ֖א כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּבָּ֑יִת וְאַ֥חַר כֵּ֛ן יָבֹ֥א הַכֹּהֵ֖ן לִרְא֥וֹת אֶת־הַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall command, that they carry forth all things out of the house, before he go into it, and see whether it have the leprosy, let all things become unclean that are in the house. And afterwards he shall go in to view the leprosy of the house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin pitää papin käskemän heidän lakaista huoneen, ennenkuin pappi siihen menee katsomaan haavaa, ettei kaikki, jotka huoneessa ovat, saastutettaisi: sitte pitää papin menemän katselemaan huonetta.
verses.king_james: Then the priest shall command that they empty the house, before the priest go into it to see the plague, that all that is in the house be not made unclean: and afterward the priest shall go in to see the house:

verses.latin_vulgate: et cum viderit in parietibus illius quasi valliculas pallore sive rubore deformes, et humiliores superficie reliqua,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָאָ֣ה אֶת־הַנֶּ֗גַע וְהִנֵּ֤ה הַנֶּ֙גַע֙ בְּקִירֹ֣ת הַבַּ֔יִת שְׁקַֽעֲרוּרֹת֙ יְרַקְרַקֹּ֔ת א֖וֹ אֲדַמְדַּמֹּ֑ת וּמַרְאֵיהֶ֥ן שָׁפָ֖ל מִן־הַקִּֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And if he see in the walls thereof as it were little dints, disfigured with paleness or redness, and lower than all he rest:
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska hän näkee haavan, ja löytää, että huoneen seinissä viheriäiset ja punahtavat onnet ovat, ja ovat nähdä matalammat muuta seinää;
verses.king_james: And he shall look on the plague, and, behold, if the plague be in the walls of the house with hollow strakes, greenish or reddish, which in sight are lower than the wall;

verses.latin_vulgate: egredietur ostium domus, et statim claudet illam septem diebus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָצָ֧א הַכֹּהֵ֛ן מִן־הַבַּ֖יִת אֶל־פֶּ֣תַח הַבָּ֑יִת וְהִסְגִּ֥יר אֶת־הַבַּ֖יִת שִׁבְעַ֥ת יָמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall go out of the door of the house, and forthwith shut it up seven days,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin lähtekään pappi huoneen ovesta, ja sulkekaan huoneen kiinni seitsemäksi päiväksi.
verses.king_james: Then the priest shall go out of the house to the door of the house, and shut up the house seven days:

verses.latin_vulgate: Reversusque die septimo, considerabit eam : si invenerit crevisse lepram,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁ֥ב הַכֹּהֵ֖ן בַּיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִ֑י וְרָאָ֕ה וְהִנֵּ֛ה פָּשָׂ֥ה הַנֶּ֖גַע בְּקִירֹ֥ת הַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And returning on the seventh day, he shall look upon it. If he find that the leprosy is spread,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koska pappi seitsemäntenä päivänä palajaa ja näkee haavan itsensä levittäneeksi huoneen seiniin;
verses.king_james: And the priest shall come again the seventh day, and shall look: and, behold, if the plague be spread in the walls of the house;

verses.latin_vulgate: jubebit erui lapides in quibus lepra est, et projici eos extra civitatem in locum immundum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְצִוָּה֙ הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְחִלְּצוּ֙ אֶת־הָ֣אֲבָנִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר בָּהֵ֖ן הַנָּ֑גַע וְהִשְׁלִ֤יכוּ אֶתְהֶן֙ אֶל־מִח֣וּץ לָעִ֔יר אֶל־מָק֖וֹם טָמֵֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall command, that the stones wherein the leprosy is, be taken out, and cast without the city into an unclean place:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin pitää papin käskemän heidän kangottaa ulos kiviä, joissa haava on, ja heittää niitä kaupungista ulos, saastaiseen paikkaan.
verses.king_james: Then the priest shall command that they take away the stones in which the plague is, and they shall cast them into an unclean place without the city:

verses.latin_vulgate: domum autem ipsam radi intrinsecus per circuitum, et spargi pulverem rasuræ extra urbem in locum immundum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַבַּ֛יִת יַקְצִ֥עַ מִבַּ֖יִת סָבִ֑יב וְשָׁפְכ֗וּ אֶת־הֶֽעָפָר֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הִקְצ֔וּ אֶל־מִח֣וּץ לָעִ֔יר אֶל־מָק֖וֹם טָמֵֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And that the house be scraped on the inside round about, and the dust of the scrapings be scattered without the city into an unclean place:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja huone pitää sisältä kaikki ympärinsä puhtaaksi kaavittaman, ja kaavittu savi heitettämän kaupungista ulos, saastaiseen paikkaan.
verses.king_james: And he shall cause the house to be scraped within round about, and they shall pour out the dust that they scrape off without the city into an unclean place:

verses.latin_vulgate: lapidesque alios reponi pro his qui ablati fuerint, et luto alio liniri domum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָקְחוּ֙ אֲבָנִ֣ים אֲחֵר֔וֹת וְהֵבִ֖יאוּ אֶל־תַּ֣חַת הָאֲבָנִ֑ים וְעָפָ֥ר אַחֵ֛ר יִקַּ֖ח וְטָ֥ח אֶת־הַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And that other stones be laid in the place of them that were taken away, and the house be plastered with other mortar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän pitää ottaman toiset kivet, ja paneman niiden kivein siaan, ja ottaman toisen saven, ja sivuman huoneen.
verses.king_james: And they shall take other stones, and put them in the place of those stones; and he shall take other morter, and shall plaister the house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sin autem postquam eruti sunt lapides, et pulvis erasus, et alia terra lita,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־יָשׁ֤וּב הַנֶּ֙גַע֙ וּפָרַ֣ח בַּבַּ֔יִת אַחַ֖ר חִלֵּ֣ץ אֶת־הָאֲבָנִ֑ים וְאַחֲרֵ֛י הִקְצ֥וֹת אֶת־הַבַּ֖יִת וְאַחֲרֵ֥י הִטּֽוֹחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if after the stones be taken out, and the dust scraped off, and it be plastered with other earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos siis haava jällensä tulee, ja pakahtuu ulos huoneessa sittekuin kivet ovat kangotetut ulos, ja huone vastuudesta sivuttu;
verses.king_james: And if the plague come again, and break out in the house, after that he hath taken away the stones, and after he hath scraped the house, and after it is plaistered;

verses.latin_vulgate: ingressus sacerdos viderit reversam lepram, et parietes respersos maculis, lepra est perseverans, et immunda domus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָא֙ הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְרָאָ֕ה וְהִנֵּ֛ה פָּשָׂ֥ה הַנֶּ֖גַע בַּבָּ֑יִת צָרַ֨עַת מַמְאֶ֥רֶת הִ֛וא בַּבַּ֖יִת טָמֵ֥א הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: The priest going in perceive that the leprosy is returned, and the walls full of spots, it is a lasting leprosy, and the house is unclean.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin pitää papin menemän sen sisälle, ja koska hän näkee haavan laskeneeksi itsensä leviämmälle huoneessa, niin on tosin kuluttuvainen spitali siinä huoneessa, ja se on saastainen.
verses.king_james: Then the priest shall come and look, and, behold, if the plague be spread in the house, it is a fretting leprosy in the house: it is unclean.

verses.latin_vulgate: quam statim destruent, et lapides ejus ac ligna, atque universum pulverem projicient extra oppidum in locum immundum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַ֣ץ אֶת־הַבַּ֗יִת אֶת־אֲבָנָיו֙ וְאֶת־עֵצָ֔יו וְאֵ֖ת כׇּל־עֲפַ֣ר הַבָּ֑יִת וְהוֹצִיא֙ אֶל־מִח֣וּץ לָעִ֔יר אֶל־מָק֖וֹם טָמֵֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall destroy it forthwith, and shall cast the stones and timber thereof, and all the dust without the town into an unclean place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden pitää se huone särjettämän, sekä kivet että puut, ja kaikki savi huoneesta, ja vietävä kaupungista ulos, saastaiseen paikkaan.
verses.king_james: And he shall break down the house, the stones of it, and the timber thereof, and all the morter of the house; and he shall carry them forth out of the city into an unclean place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui intraverit domum quando clausa est, immundus erit usque ad vesperum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַבָּא֙ אֶל־הַבַּ֔יִת כׇּל־יְמֵ֖י הִסְגִּ֣יר אֹת֑וֹ יִטְמָ֖א עַד־הָעָֽרֶב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that entereth into the house when it is shut, shall be unclean until evening,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se joka käy huoneessa niinkauvan kuin se teljetty on, hänen pitää oleman saastainen ehtoosen asti.
verses.king_james: Moreover he that goeth into the house all the while that it is shut up shall be unclean until the even.

verses.latin_vulgate: et qui dormierit in ea, et comederit quippiam, lavabit vestimenta sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַשֹּׁכֵ֣ב בַּבַּ֔יִת יְכַבֵּ֖ס אֶת־בְּגָדָ֑יו וְהָאֹכֵ֣ל בַּבַּ֔יִת יְכַבֵּ֖ס אֶת־בְּגָדָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he that sleepeth in it, and eateth any thing, shall wash his clothes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sen joka siinä huoneessa makaa, pitää vaatteensa pesemän, ja se joka syö siinä huoneessa, pitää vaatteensa pesemän.
verses.king_james: And he that lieth in the house shall wash his clothes; and he that eateth in the house shall wash his clothes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod si introiens sacerdos viderit lepram non crevisse in domo, postquam denuo lita fuerit, purificabit eam reddita sanitate :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־בֹּ֨א יָבֹ֜א הַכֹּהֵ֗ן וְרָאָה֙ וְ֠הִנֵּ֠ה לֹא־פָשָׂ֤ה הַנֶּ֙גַע֙ בַּבַּ֔יִת אַחֲרֵ֖י הִטֹּ֣חַ אֶת־הַבָּ֑יִת וְטִהַ֤ר הַכֹּהֵן֙ אֶת־הַבַּ֔יִת כִּ֥י נִרְפָּ֖א הַנָּֽגַע׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if the priest going in perceive that the leprosy is not spread in the house, after it was plastered again, he shall purify it, it being cured.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos myös pappi menee ja näkee, ettei haava ole laskenut itseänsä leviämmelle huoneessa, sittekuin se sivuttu on, niin sanokaan sen puhtaaksi; sillä haava on parannut.
verses.king_james: And if the priest shall come in, and look upon it, and, behold, the plague hath not spread in the house, after the house was plaistered: then the priest shall pronounce the house clean, because the plague is healed.

verses.latin_vulgate: et in purificationem ejus sumet duos passeres, lignumque cedrinum, et vermiculum atque hyssopum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָקַ֛ח לְחַטֵּ֥א אֶת־הַבַּ֖יִת שְׁתֵּ֣י צִפֳּרִ֑ים וְעֵ֣ץ אֶ֔רֶז וּשְׁנִ֥י תוֹלַ֖עַת וְאֵזֹֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And for the purification thereof he shall take two sparrows, and cedar wood, and scarlet, and hyssop.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pitää ottaman huoneen puhdistamiseksi kaksi lintua, niin myös sedripuuta, ja tulipunalla painetuita villoja, ja isoppia,
verses.king_james: And he shall take to cleanse the house two birds, and cedar wood, and scarlet, and hyssop:

verses.latin_vulgate: et immolato uno passere in vase fictili super aquas vivas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁחַ֖ט אֶת־הַצִּפֹּ֣ר הָאֶחָ֑ת אֶל־כְּלִי־חֶ֖רֶשׂ עַל־מַ֥יִם חַיִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And having immolated one sparrow in an earthen vessel, over living waters,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teurastaman toisen linnun savisessa astiassa, vuotavan veden tykönä.
verses.king_james: And he shall kill the one of the birds in an earthen vessel over running water:

verses.latin_vulgate: tollet lignum cedrinum, et hyssopum, et coccum, et passerem vivum, et tinget omnia in sanguine passeris immolati, atque in aquis viventibus, et asperget domum septies,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלָקַ֣ח אֶת־עֵֽץ־הָ֠אֶ֠רֶז וְאֶת־הָ֨אֵזֹ֜ב וְאֵ֣ת ׀ שְׁנִ֣י הַתּוֹלַ֗עַת וְאֵת֮ הַצִּפֹּ֣ר הַֽחַיָּה֒ וְטָבַ֣ל אֹתָ֗ם בְּדַם֙ הַצִּפֹּ֣ר הַשְּׁחוּטָ֔ה וּבַמַּ֖יִם הַֽחַיִּ֑ים וְהִזָּ֥ה אֶל־הַבַּ֖יִת שֶׁ֥בַע פְּעָמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall take the cedar wood, and the hyssop, and the scarlet, and the living sparrow, and shall dip all in the blood of the sparrow that is immolated, and in the living water: and he shall sprinkle the house seven times.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pitää ottaman sedripuun, ja isopin, ja tulipunalla painetuita villoja, ja elävän linnun, ja kastaman ne sen vereen, ja vuotavaan veteen, ja priiskottaman huoneen seitsemän kertaa,
verses.king_james: And he shall take the cedar wood, and the hyssop, and the scarlet, and the living bird, and dip them in the blood of the slain bird, and in the running water, and sprinkle the house seven times:

verses.latin_vulgate: purificabitque eam tam in sanguine passeris quam in aquis viventibus, et in passere vivo, lignoque cedrino et hyssopo atque vermiculo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחִטֵּ֣א אֶת־הַבַּ֔יִת בְּדַם֙ הַצִּפּ֔וֹר וּבַמַּ֖יִם הַֽחַיִּ֑ים וּבַצִּפֹּ֣ר הַחַיָּ֗ה וּבְעֵ֥ץ הָאֶ֛רֶז וּבָאֵזֹ֖ב וּבִשְׁנִ֥י הַתּוֹלָֽעַת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And shall purify it as well with the blood of the sparrow, as with the living water, and with the living sparrow, and with the cedar wood, and the hyssop, and the scarlet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja puhdistaman huoneen linnun verellä, ja vuotavalla vedellä, niin myös elävällä linnulla, sedripuulla, isopilla ja tulipunalla painetulla villalla.
verses.king_james: And he shall cleanse the house with the blood of the bird, and with the running water, and with the living bird, and with the cedar wood, and with the hyssop, and with the scarlet:

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque dimiserit passerem avolare in agrum libere, orabit pro domo, et jure mundabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשִׁלַּ֞ח אֶת־הַצִּפֹּ֧ר הַֽחַיָּ֛ה אֶל־מִח֥וּץ לָעִ֖יר אֶל־פְּנֵ֣י הַשָּׂדֶ֑ה וְכִפֶּ֥ר עַל־הַבַּ֖יִת וְטָהֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he hath let go the sparrow to fly freely away into the field, he shall pray for the house: and it shall be rightly cleansed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sitte päästäkään elävän linnun lentämään kaupungista kedolle, ja sovittakaan huoneen, niin se on puhdas.
verses.king_james: But he shall let go the living bird out of the city into the open fields, and make an atonement for the house: and it shall be clean.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ista est lex omnis lepræ et percussuræ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֖את הַתּוֹרָ֑ה לְכׇל־נֶ֥גַע הַצָּרַ֖עַת וְלַנָּֽתֶק׃
verses.douay_rheims: This is the law of every kind of leprosy and stroke.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on kaikkinaisen spitalin ja syhelmän haavain sääty:
verses.king_james: This is the law for all manner of plague of leprosy, and scall,

verses.latin_vulgate: lepræ vestium et domorum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְצָרַ֥עַת הַבֶּ֖גֶד וְלַבָּֽיִת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of the leprosy of garments and houses,
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaatteen ja huoneen spitalin,
verses.king_james: And for the leprosy of a garment, and of a house,

verses.latin_vulgate: cicatricis et erumpentium papularum, lucentis maculæ, et in varias species, coloribus immutatis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלַשְׂאֵ֥ת וְלַסַּפַּ֖חַת וְלַבֶּהָֽרֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of a scar and of blisters breaking out of a shining spot, and when the colours are diversely changed:
verses.finnish_biblia: Paisumain, pisamain ja putkenpolttamien,
verses.king_james: And for a rising, and for a scab, and for a bright spot:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut possit sciri quo tempore mundum quid, vel immundum sit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְהוֹרֹ֕ת בְּי֥וֹם הַטָּמֵ֖א וּבְי֣וֹם הַטָּהֹ֑ר זֹ֥את תּוֹרַ֖ת הַצָּרָֽעַת׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: That it may be known when a thing is clean or unclean.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että pitää tiedettämän, mikä puhdas eli saastainen kunakin päivänä oleman pitää. Tämä on sääty spitalista.
verses.king_james: To teach when it is unclean, and when it is clean: this is the law of leprosy.
